special_mechanics.name: Bicycle Riding
special_mechanics.description: Player controls paperboy on bicycle via handlebars (arcade), steers and controls speed. Primary movement mechanic.

special_mechanics.name: Jump/Ramp Physics
special_mechanics.description: Training course features ramps to jump over walls, ditches, and holes. Papers on Sunday level travel more slowly when thrown than earlier days (gravity/weight difference).

special_mechanics.name: Paper Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Player throws papers onto porches or into mailboxes. Throwable with A or B button (international versions); Japanese version A only.

special_mechanics.name: Collision/Crash Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Crashing into obstacles on main route costs one life. Training course crash ends it immediately without penalty.

tier_notes: Tier 2: No quantitative physics values documented. Sources contain game design information, level progression, controls, and mechanics descriptions, but no numerical movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision data.
